title: Full Stack Web Development
description: Developing scalable, high-performance web applications with modern frontend and backend technologies.
dialogDescription: I build production-grade web applications using Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, and ShadCN UI for dynamic interfaces. On the backend, I use Node.js and Express.js with MySQL, MongoDB, and PostgreSQL. I focus on scalability, clean API design, and high-performance systems with caching and async processing.
highlight1: Frontend: React.js, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, ShadCN UI, Redux Toolkit
highlight2: Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, Socket.io
highlight4: Deployment: Docker, Vercel, Render, AWS (Lightsail, EC2)

title: AI Integration
description: Integrating AI-powered features into applications for automation, content generation, and intelligent user experiences.
dialogDescription: I build AI-powered features using OpenAI and Gemini APIs, including structured answer generation, summarization, and content automation. I focus on prompt engineering, secure backend integration, and optimizing API usage for performance and cost efficiency in production systems.
highlight1: AI APIs: OpenAI API (GPT-4o mini, GPT-5.1 Pro), Gemini API
highlight2: Features: Answer Generation, Summarization, AI Chat, Content Automation
highlight3: Tech Stack: Next.js + Express.js + AI APIs
highlight4: Optimization: Rate Limiting, Caching, Secure API Handling

title: RESTful API Development
description: Designing and implementing secure, scalable RESTful and real-time APIs for modern applications.
dialogDescription: I design scalable RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express.js with proper authentication, validation, and performance optimization. I also implement real-time communication using WebSockets (Socket.io) and async processing using queue systems for high-performance applications.
highlight2: Security: JWT, OAuth 2.0, Rate Limiting, RBAC
highlight3: Async Systems: Inngest (Queue System), Background Jobs

title: Database Management
description: Designing, optimizing, and managing relational and NoSQL databases with focus on performance.
dialogDescription: I manage SQL and NoSQL databases with focus on indexing, query optimization, and scalability. I use Redis for caching and performance improvements and handle schema design, migrations, and efficient data handling for production applications.
highlight3: Features: Indexing, Query Optimization, Scalable Schema Design

title: UI/UX Design Implementation
description: Creating responsive, high-performance, and visually appealing interfaces with smooth interactions.
dialogDescription: I build clean, responsive, and performant user interfaces using Tailwind CSS and ShadCN UI. I focus on user experience, fast loading, and accessibility while adding smooth animations to enhance engagement.

title: Authentication & Security
description: Implementing secure authentication systems and protecting applications with best practices.
dialogDescription: I build secure authentication systems using JWT, OAuth, and modern session management. I implement role-based access control, rate limiting, and secure API practices to protect applications and ensure data integrity.
highlight1: Auth Methods: JWT (Access & Refresh Tokens), OAuth 2.0
highlight2: Providers: Google Login, Custom Auth Systems
highlight3: Security: Rate Limiting, RBAC, Secure APIs
highlight4: Best Practices: Token Security, Protected Routes, API Validation
